speaker: Argo
text: (Umm... Is this where we’re supposed to meet…?) *sigh*

speaker: Scheat
text: Over here, Argo.

speaker: Argo
text: Oh, Lord Scheat! Good afternoon.

speaker: Scheat
text: Hm. I commend you for coming just like you promised, Argo. *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: I’m also here because I was guided by a card. *sigh*

speaker: Scheat
text: Excellent, what a splendid ability!

speaker: Scheat
text: Now come, have a seat. Why don’t we have a chat. *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: Okay.

speaker: Argo
text: What a nice place you’ve got here.

speaker: Scheat
text: You think so? I needed a place to relax and unwind, so I had this garden built just for me.

speaker: Argo
text: Relax, huh...?
It certainly is relaxing… With the light softly shining through the open ceiling, it’s quite pleasant.
"It’s half-indoor, half-outdoor, giving me a feeling of both blended together." *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: But is it all right for me to be here?

speaker: Scheat
text: This garden was originally meant for receiving visitors.

speaker: Scheat
text: But... I do not have many, so I suppose it is wasted on me…

speaker: Argo
text: "I don't understand..." *sigh*

speaker: Scheat
text: It is for that reason you should come right to me if you need help with anything!

speaker: Argo
text: You’re available for consultations? *sigh*

speaker: Scheat
text: Yes! I cannot guarantee that I will be able to solve all your problems, though!

speaker: Argo
text: (Maybe this is just a way for him to pass the time…)

speaker: Argo
text: You’re the one who wanted me to enroll?

speaker: Scheat
text: I found you and told Celio, so it is more like he was the one who made the recommendation.

speaker: Argo
text: You found me...?

speaker: Scheat
text: I often sneak off the island in the middle of the night and fly around. *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: Is it safe for you to do that?

speaker: Scheat
text: I am less likely to be spotted then, so I can fly as much as I want. *

speaker: Argo
text: (Does he really not want to be seen that much…??)

speaker: Scheat
text: ...While I was flying, I saw the radiance of a great ability shining in a small village.

speaker: Argo
text: That was me, right?

speaker: Scheat
text: *Correct.*

speaker: Argo
text: You can tell even when you’re so far away?

speaker: Scheat
text: Well... Only as far as my eyes can see. To be honest, it was just by chance that I saw it while flying over your village. *sigh*

speaker: Scheat
text: Perhaps it was the power of destiny that drew me there.

speaker: Argo
text:
...Um, I know it’s kind of late now, but thank you.
For finding me, I mean.

speaker: Scheat
text: I really did just stumble upon you by accident, you know.

speaker: Argo
text: But it’s thanks to you finding me that I get a chance to become the knight I always dreamed of being. *sigh*

speaker: Scheat
text: Oh? You have always wished to be one?

speaker: Argo
text: Yes!

speaker: Scheat
text: ...And to be so talented...?

speaker: Scheat
text: This must be fate or something…

speaker: Argo
text: You say it's boring, but... I’m really enjoying life here. I look forward to things like the bath every day.

speaker: Scheat
text: What is enjoyable about the bath? Is it not just getting into water?

speaker: Argo
text: There's more to it than that… It’s fun to think about who to invite. *

speaker: Scheat
text: Invite? You always ask someone to get in the bath with you? *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: Yeah, our dorm has a big one, after all.

speaker: Argo
text: There are things you can only talk about when you’re naked together there. *sigh*

speaker: Scheat
text: Can you, now? The presence or lack of clothing changes what you can discuss?

speaker: Argo
text: Well... / being naked brings down the wall between your minds and hearts, I guess... It’s like being closer than you normally are.

speaker: Scheat
text: Oh...? An easier way to become friends...

speaker: Scheat
text: ...I see... So that is what it's like... I always bath alone…

speaker: Scheat
text: I had no idea mortals did such a thing...

speaker: Argo
text: (…Everyone must keep their distance from him out of respect and reverence…) *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: (That’s why he seems so lonely…)

speaker: Argo
text: ...Um... If it’s all right with you… would you like to take a bath with me sometime? *sigh*

speaker: Scheat
text: What!?

speaker: Argo
text: I know I’m being presumptuous, but…

speaker: Scheat
text: No, not at all!

speaker: Scheat
text: Yes! I have no choice! We shall bathe together! A student has requested it!

speaker: Argo
text: (He looks so happy…)

speaker: Argo
text: Do you have any hobbies you can do on this island? *sigh*

speaker: Scheat
text: There were, but all of the ones I could think of became boring. *sigh*

speaker: Scheat
text: The only change that comes in my life are things like the new students at the knights college.

speaker: Scheat
text: That is why I always enjoy meeting them.

speaker: Argo
text: "I don't understand..." *sigh*

speaker: Scheat
text: But everyone keeps their distance after that, so the loneliness is constant. *

speaker: Argo
text: (So... that’s why he’s having me do this…)

speaker: Scheat
text: Someone visiting me like you are is quite rare.
Seeing him look so happy makes me feel the same way.

speaker: Argo
text: ...I'll visit you whenever I can, Lord Scheat.

speaker: Argo
text: If you want, we could look for something fun to do on this island.

speaker: Scheat
text: Really? All right! I shall bring some snacks next time!

speaker: Argo
text: (...Even though he’s a dragon, we're not so different on the inside, are we?) *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: Pardon me, but I have to go soon.

speaker: Scheat
text: What!? Leaving already? *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: I only have so much free time… I’ll come back. *sigh*

speaker: Scheat
text: I see...

speaker: Argo
text: (Please don’t look so sad…)
